# Vendor Dashboard

## Overview
Dashboard utama vendor dengan overview produk, pesanan, dan earnings.

## File Location
- `src/pages/vendor/Dashboard.tsx` - Halaman dashboard
- `src/components/layouts/VendorLayout.tsx` - Layout

## Database Tables
- `vendors` - Data vendor
- `products` - Produk
- `orders` - Pesanan
- `vendor_bank_accounts` - Bank accounts

## Features
- ✅ Total products
- ✅ Active orders
- ✅ Total earnings
- ✅ Pending earnings
- ✅ Recent orders
- ✅ Quick actions

## Implementation Status
| Feature | Status |
|---------|--------|
| Stats Cards | ✅ Complete |
| Recent Orders | ✅ Complete |
| Quick Actions | ✅ Complete |
| Earnings | ✅ Complete |

## Dashboard Cards
- Total Products
- Active Orders
- Total Earnings
- Pending Disbursement
- Rating

## Related Components
- `VendorChatbot`
- `VendorEscrowWidget`
